collision energy: fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) at a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 36%
enrichment method: phosphorylated peptides were eluted in 50% ACN + 2.5% ammonium hydroxide and filtered through a C18 stage tips to avoid carryover of magnetic beads then dried under vacuum before mass spectrometry analysis.
instrument: The peptides were analyzed on an Orbitrap Ascend Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: Ionization was performed using a nanospray flex source held at +2.0 kV compared to ground
labeling: samples were TMT labeled for 1 h at 20 °C with 400 RPM of shaking by adding 62.5 μg of different TMT 16-plex channels
reduction reagent: prepared in 2x Laemmli SDS sample buffer with beta-mercaptoethanol
